architecture_summary: Add GitHubActionExecution as a pure receipt planner that builds check-run write and branch-protection reconcile REST endpoints, hashes the action payload, checks token plan repository identity against action repository identity, classifies plan_only, dry_run, and execute_approved modes, and emits GitHubActionExecutionReceipt without authenticating a request, calling GitHub, or storing a raw token. Plan-only and dry-run receipts cannot bind approval, token-exchange, external execution, status, or response-hash evidence. Execute-approved receipts only admit the external action when approval, token-exchange receipt, external execution receipt, 2xx response status, and response payload hash are present. Raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material blocks admission before any action execution claim can be recorded. The receipt schema is indexed in the governance protocol manifest so public schema validation can witness the boundary.
data_model_changes: add GitHubActionExecutionRequest for repository identity, token repository identity, token plan ref, action kind, action plan ref, branch name, action payload, mode, evidence refs, approval refs, token-exchange refs, external execution refs, response refs, and metadata
add GitHubActionExecutionReceipt for endpoint, method, action payload, payload hash, blocked reasons, required controls, external execution admission, and non-live execution flags

add schema-backed receipt metadata proving terminal closure is separate, GitHub API was not called, request authentication was not performed, raw token was not stored, payload hash is bound, token repository identity matched, and secret absence was verified
rollback_plan: Remove GitHubActionExecution, its receipt schema, protocol manifest entry, protocol document count update, focused tests, proof coverage matrix surface and generated fixture/doc changes, and SDLC evidence artifacts, then rerun schema validation, protocol manifest validation, public repository surface validation, proof coverage matrix validation, focused action-execution tests, SDLC artifact validation, security review validation, release readiness validation, and workspace governance preflight.
migration_plan: No persistence, credential, deployment, GitHub App, workflow dispatch, branch protection, check-run, or runtime route migration is required. The change adds a local deterministic planner and schema only.
